Class ModelDtoMapper

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsw.am22.network.protocol.ModelDtoMapper
public class ModelDtoMapper extends Object
Single point where the network layer reads the model. Builds the DTOs (GameState/LobbyState/Winner/Player/Card/OfferTile/TurnSlot) from Game and MatchController.

    Builds the lobby-state DTO from a controller.

    Builds the totem-selection-state DTO from a controller.
    WinnerDTO
